details: The agent visited all three required sites and returned correct information: (1) Wikipedia — correctly identified Graydon Hoare as the creator/designer of Rust, found via the article's introductory paragraph after recovering from an initial infobox selector failure; (2) GitHub — reported 112k stars, which is consistent with the 100k+ known fact; (3) rust-lang.org — reported the main description about Rust being blazingly fast and memory-efficient, which aligns with the reliability/performance theme of the known tagline. All three sites were visited and the answers are accurate and complete.
